displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #23: In the Empire's Service, Part 3
synopsis: Rogue Squadron brings the battle to the Imperials as X-wings and TIEs zigzag among the lofty minarets of Brentaal. More than one Rogue will be shot down this day, but an X-wing pilot on the ground with a blaster is twice as angry and almost as dangerous!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #23: In the Empire's Service, Part 3
